heading: CREATION OF PEST MANAGEMENT ZONES
operative_text:
(a) The commissioner by rule may designate an area of this state as a proposed pest management zone.
(b) The commissioner may hold a public hearing in the proposed pest management zone to discuss the proposed geographic boundaries of the zone. The public hearing may include any other topic allowed under this chapter.
(c) After the adoption of a rule under Subsection (a), the commissioner shall conduct a referendum under Section 80.006.
_note: No defined terms with explicit definitions appear in this section. Cross-reference to Section 80.006 identified in Subsection (c).
